children.heading: .—Exclusive Jurisdiction
children.label: a .—Exclusive Jurisdiction
children.text: An amateur sports organization that conducts amateur athletic competition shall have exclusive jurisdiction over that competition if participation is restricted to a specific class of amateur athletes, such as high school students, college students, members of the Armed Forces, or similar groups or categories.
conduct international amateur athletic competition in the United States; or
sponsor international amateur athletic competition to be held outside the United States.
